summary: Completed testing of Loans (Leningen) feature in Kiosk Admin Dashboard. Backend: 13/17 tests passed (76%). Frontend: All UI components working correctly. Found 1 critical backend bug: payment amount validation missing.

critical.issue: Payment amount exceeding remaining balance is NOT rejected. Backend allows overpayment which causes loan to be marked as paid_off with negative remaining (clamped to 0). This is a validation bug.
critical.expected_behavior: Should return 400/422 error when payment amount > remaining balance
critical.actual_behavior: Returns 200 and processes the payment, marking loan as paid_off

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: Add validation in POST /api/kiosk/admin/loans/{loan_id}/pay to reject payments where amount > remaining balance. Add check before line 2308 in kiosk.py: if data.amount > (loan['amount'] - total_paid_before): raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail='Bedrag kan niet hoger zijn dan het openstaande saldo')
critical_code_review_comments: Missing payment amount validation in create_loan_payment endpoint (line 2284-2356 in kiosk.py)
Frontend correctly validates this in LoanPayModal (line 3280) but backend should also validate
WhatsApp notifications for loan_created and loan_payment are correctly implemented
seed_data_creation: Test loans created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Loans feature is mostly working. The only critical issue is missing backend validation for payment amount exceeding remaining balance. Frontend validates this correctly but backend should also validate. All other CRUD operations work correctly. WhatsApp notifications are triggered for loan_created and loan_payment message types.

tests_executed.result: FAIL - Test script issue with response format
FAIL - Test script issue with response format
